description: Monday 1 December 2025 | Transport and Infrastructure Committee 2024/25 Annual Review of the New Zealand Infrastructure Commission Hearing of evidence: New Zealand Infrastructure Commission, Te Waihanga Raveen Jaduram, Chair Geoff Cooper, Chief Executive Andy Hagan, General Manager – Investment Paul Alexander, Director Policy – Strategy Jon Bulter, Lead Adviser, Strategy and Policy Caine Garrity, Chief Financial Officer Shahlaa Al-Tiay, Manager, Ministerial Services James Mugambi, Private Secretary 2024/25 Annual review of KiwiRail Holdings Limited; Briefing on the performance of Ferry Holdings Limited; 2024/25 Annual review of the New Zealand Railways Corporation Hearing of evidence: Rt Hon Winston Peters, Minister for Rail KiwiRail Holdings Limited Sue Tindal, Chair Peter Reidy, CEO Ferry Holdings Chris Mackenzie, Chair Sandip Ranchod, CEO Nicola Martin, Communications and Government Relations Lead
descriptionSummary: 2024/25 Annual Review of the New Zealand Infrastructure Commission. New Zealand Infrastructure Commission, Te Waihanga. Raveen Jaduram, Chair
